mapper.select: select menu_id, parent_id, biz_type, permission, path, component, redirect, always_show, hidden, name, title, icon, no_cache, breadcrumb, affix, active_menu, seq from menu where biz_type = #{sysType} order by seq asc, menu_id asc
select distinct rm.menu_id from user_role ur inner join role_menu rm on ur.role_id = rm.role_id where ur.user_id = #{userId} and rm.menu_id is not null
